heading: Index Suggestions
body:
The **Performance Advisor** ranks the indexes according to
their **Impact**, which is based on the total wasted bytes read
by the associated operations. To learn more about how the Performance Advisor ranks
indexes, see [Review Index Ranking](pa-index-ranking).

To learn how to create indexes that the Performance Advisor suggests, see
[Create Suggested Indexes](pa-create-suggested-indexes).
